commands.notes: Default Vitest suite passed (6 files, 24 tests).

verification.regression_notes: Added malformed-workpack fallback coverage in detail panel tests. This file is currently outside the default Vitest include allowlist.

handoff.summary: Added an error boundary around WorkpackDetailPanel rendering so malformed workpack data now yields a valid fallback webview and logs diagnostics to a VS Code OutputChannel.
next_steps: Include src/views/__tests__/detail-panel.test.ts in vitest.config.ts once its CommonJS-based vscode mocking harness is migrated for the current Vitest execution model.
known_issues: src/views/__tests__/detail-panel.test.ts is not executed by npm run test because vitest.config.ts uses an explicit include allowlist that excludes this test file.
